product.name: Rapink 48 Port Cat6 Patch Panel with Inline Keystone 10G Support, Pass-Thru Coupler UTP 19-Inch, Removable Back Bar, 1U Network for Cat6, Cat5e, Cat5 Cabling
features: Toolless termination: This home networking panel does not require puch down tools. Pass through 48 port patch panel came with couplers making it easier to connect the cables. This Cat6 patch panel has more expansion and upgrade capabilities than 12 port patch panel, 16 port patch panel, and 24 port patch panel cat6.

Easy use and Time save: Up to 80% time save and only 10 minutes needed to install Cat6 UTP inline 2u patch panel. This ethernet patch panel is much better than punching down keystones patch panel 48 port and 110 punch blocks.

Easy expansion and repaire: Its patch panel holder allows easy input and output cat6 coupler. Therfore, convenient to repaire when 1 port network broken. Meanwhile, if need expand in the future, you can easliy replace cat6 coupler with other coupler such as fiber adaptor, coax coupler, HDMI, VGA and so on.

10G speed via Gold plated pins: All 8P8C of rj45 jack panel keystone are golden plated to support better network connection up to 10G speed Ethernet network. This is a well made keystone panel and can be used as cat6 patch panel to upgrade cat6 network.

Detachable back bar included: This patch panel wall mount contains thick steel detachable back bar. With zip ties, it can effectively reduce the deformation of the ethernet cable, improve the working stability of the network connection port, and avoid keystone loose and the occurrence of network failures caused by the loosening and deformation of the cable. What you get? 48 pcs sturdy cat6 coupler keystone loaded patch panel wall mount, removable cable back bar, screws, tie wraps.
